name: Osage-chan
description: The character featured in [inabakumori](https://anilist.co/staff/244419/inabakumori)'s music videos. Until the release of "Lost Umbrella", he drew it himself. Now, she's drawn by artist Nukunukunigirimeshi.

name: Perospero Charlotte
nativeName: シャーロット・ペロスペロー
description: __Charlotte Perospero__ is the eldest child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. He also serves as Totto Land's Minister of Candy, governing over Candy island. ~!Due to his actions and role, he is a major antagonist in the Whole Cake Island Arc.!~ (Source: One Piece Wiki)

name: Pinga
description: [Pingu](https://anilist.co/character/128104/Pingu)'s sister.

name: Raishin Akabane
description: Raishin is a survivor of the Akabane clan, a prestigious clan of puppeteers. He attends the Royal Academy in hopes to improve his skills and become the best in the world and with intent to avenge his family. Despite his poor examination results and lack of experience, he has excellent combat skills. His unique fighting style combines magic and martial arts.

name: Red XIII
description: First appearing in Final Fantasy VII. Red XII is a young warrior and last of his tribe. He first meets Cloud in the Shinra HQ as a test subject of the scientist Hojo. Red goes with Cloud and the others throughout the entire game developing tight bonds and learning about his own shrouded history. Red again appears in Final Fantasy Advent Children in a cameo appearance in the fight against Bahamut-SIN with Cait Sith riding on his back. description: A conman in the Osaka division alongside Sasara Nurude and Rosho Tsutsujimori. name: Reiri Kamura
description: A female vampire who attends the same school as Hiro. She has long black hair, always dresses in a dark sailor suit, and has idol status in her school. In the manga there are many scenes showing her in black underwear but in the anime those are reduced to panty shots. She tried to get Hime's blood but failed. name: Ribon-chan
description: __Height:__ 7.5 cm Owned by Maria-chan. She is a somewhat unworldly hamster who loves her blue ribbons, but she is not above getting dirty when she needs to help her friends, and has been known to be generous and helpful. She used to live in France before moving to where she is now, but she feels attached to Japan and has even refused to go back to France. She also has a crush on [Hamtarou](https://anilist.co/character/4019/Hamtarou), though he is quite oblivious to this fact.

name: Rin Eba
description: __Height:__ 148 cm Itsuki's younger sister and Yuzuki's step-sister, who is a year older than her. She is quite fond of her older brother, and is irritated by Yuzuki, saying that she acts nice just for attention. She has also been known to tell lies in order to make Yuzuki upset. She seems to mischievous and loves to cause trouble. She shows a slight interest in Haruto.

name: Ringo Akai
description: __Height__: 160 cm (5'2") She is the one who recruits Ryōshi into Otogi Bank. She is a close friend of Ryōko Ōkami, and is always trying to involve herself with her best friend's love life. Like Ryōko, she tends to smile to hide her true feelings, and admires Ryōko for trying to become stronger. She is based on the Little Red Riding Hood from the book of the same name, though some aspects of her scheming, manipulative personality closer resemble the poisoned apple ("Ringo" means apple) of Snow W

name: Rio Kamishiro
description: Ryoga's younger twin sister. Rio once dueled IV who was operating under the orders of Tron. He played a card, "Flaming Hell Blessing", that set the surrounding area on fire. She was critically injured in the blaze and remained in the hospital for the entire first series. After the incident, Ryoga swore to avenge his younger sister, aiming his hatred towards IV. She recovers in the second series and is able to return to school again. Rio stays strong and prefers to defend herself for her brother

When Kanako met her, and tried to make small talk and ask casual questions Dorm Leader looped back to the first question to say that she might also be addressed as 'Boss' or 'God'. name: Ryououki

Overall, Ryououki personality, traits and abilities vary greatly depending from series to series, but they usually include shapeshifting and a love for carrots. In Tenchi Muyo! Ryououki, Ryououki is a unique artificial lifeform created by the universe's greatest scientist, Washu. name: S-Snake
description: S-Snake is a Seraphim-clone of [Boa Hancock](https://anilist.co/character/16342/Hancock-Boa) used by the world government as a weapon of justice. She uses the same devil fruit powers as her original counterpart and is a minor antagonist of the Final Saga.

description: A lone wolf, and the strongest senior of Suzuran in Hana's first year. A pervert and a happy-go-lucky kind of guy. Was a senior who supported Hana. Currently studying to become a teacher, planning on returning to Suzuran as one. Zetton is one of the 4 apostles. (Zetton, King Joe, Kosei Nakajima and Takeda).

name: Sakaki
description: __Anime:__ Sakaki is the Rocket Team Boss and a former Tokiwa City Gym Leader. He is a very ambitious man and is intolerant of failure. Sakaki is shown to have access to vast wealth and resources. The money probably comes from Rocket Team's main source of income — the profit of selling stolen Pokémon. nativeName: シュバルツ・ブルーダー
description: Pilot of the Gundam Spiegel (Shadow Gundam in the American version), and Neo Germany's Gundam Fighter. Schwarz is G Gundam's masked-man, similar to Char Aznable from the original series.
